items.title: The Lynx's 67 points in the first half versus the Mercury are tied for the third-most in any half of a road game in WNBA history.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
The Lynx's 67 points in the first half versus the Mercury are tied for the third-most in any half of a road game in WNBA history.

Minnesota also shot 75% in the first half, the best by any team in a half this season.

items.title: Sources told CBS Sports that Momcilovic's contract for next season will be north of $6 million.
items.author: Matt Norlander
items.body_excerpt:
Sources told CBS Sports that Momcilovic's contract for next season will be north of $6 million.

Kentucky spent $20 million-ish last season and will do it again in 2026-27.

For at least the next five months, Mark Pope can live in some peace.

items.title: The #Lynx sequence embodies how they've been playing all season
items.author: Leo S
items.body_excerpt:
The #Lynx sequence embodies how they've been playing all season

1️⃣ Kahleah Copper gets Olivia Miles to switch
2️⃣ Miles reads the lob entry and jumps it
3️⃣ Steal leads to GORGEOUS Nia Coffey hit-ahead bounce pass
4️⃣ Courtney William rewarded for running hard, finishes with acrobatic lay

items.title: BREAKING: Milan Momcilovic has committed to Kentucky, he just announced on Instagram. It's a massive get for Mark Pope, as his program beat out hated rival Louisville over the past 48 hours to land one of the best transfers in the 2026 cycle.
items.author: Matt Norlander
items.body_excerpt:
BREAKING: Milan Momcilovic has committed to Kentucky, he just announced on Instagram. It's a massive get for Mark Pope, as his program beat out hated rival Louisville over the past 48 hours to land one of the best transfers in the 2026 cycle.

UK's rocky offseason is salvaged.

Story + column:

media.title: Milan Momcilovic commits to Kentucky: Mark Pope salvages his offseason by landing last big transfer available
media.description: Momcilovic is a top-three transfer in the 2026 cycle and immediately changes the discussion around the Wildcats next season
